topics.prompt: Create a comprehensive educational module about Python lists, covering creation, indexing, slicing, methods (append, extend, pop, sort), list comprehensions, and nested lists. Include practical examples.

Create a comprehensive educational module about supervised learning, covering classification vs regression, training/testing split, overfitting/underfitting, cross-validation, and common algorithms (linear regression, decision trees, KNN). Include Python code examples using scikit-learn.

Create a comprehensive educational module comparing sorting algorithms: Bubble sort, Selection sort, Insertion sort, Merge sort, and Quick sort. Cover time complexity, space complexity, stability, and provide Python implementations with visual examples.

Create a comprehensive educational module about neural networks, covering perceptrons, activation functions (ReLU, sigmoid, softmax), forward propagation, backpropagation, loss functions, and a simple implementation using PyTorch or TensorFlow.

Create a comprehensive educational module about OOP in Python, covering classes, objects, __init__, inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, abstract classes, and decorators (@property, @staticmethod). Include practical design patterns.

topics.topic_name: Data Visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn
topics.prompt: Create a comprehensive educational module about data visualization in Python using Matplotlib and Seaborn. Cover line plots, bar charts, histograms, scatter plots, heatmaps, subplots, and best practices for clear visual communication.
